parameters.query: INSERT INTO nets_phase_outputs (task_id, lesson_id, phase_id, output_json, schema_valid, prompt_hash, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, latency_ms, cache_hit_pct) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}', '{{ $json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $json.phase_id }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.phase_output) }}'::jsonb, true, '{{ $json.prompt_hash }}', {{ $json.tokens_in }}, {{ $json.tokens_out }}, {{ $json.cost_usd }}, {{ $json.latency_ms }}, {{ $json.cache_hit_pct }}) ON CONFLICT (lesson_id, phase_id) DO UPDATE SET output_json=EXCLUDED.output_json, tokens_in=EXCLUDED.tokens_in, tokens_out=EXCLUDED.tokens_out, cost_usd=EXCLUDED.cost_usd

INSERT INTO nets_session_log (task_id, stage, phase_id, event, payload) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}', 'phase', '{{ $json.phase_id }}', 'success', '{"tokens_in": {{ $json.tokens_in }}, "cost_usd": {{ $json.cost_usd }}, "cache_hit_pct": {{ $json.cache_hit_pct }}, "latency_ms": {{ $json.latency_ms }}}'::jsonb)
